message:
fix(extensions_js): rewrite source_declares_binding as a lexer-aware scanner

The naive line-prefix approach missed declarations on the same line as
imports (e.g. inline/minified JS where "const __dirname = ..." follows
an import on the same line). Replace with a byte-level BindingScanner
state machine (DeclState + BindingLexMode) that:

- Tracks export/async/declaration keyword sequences properly
- Skips single/double/template-quoted strings and line/block comments
- Consumes JS identifiers using is_js_ident_start/is_js_ident_continue
- Handles edge cases: empty names, non-ASCII, generator functions

Tests: source_declares_binding_detects_inline_const_binding and
maybe_cjs_to_esm_leaves_inline_doom_style_dirname_module_alone

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
